caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt sits in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio. His shirt features the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" in a stylized white font. He is positioned behind a professional black microphone. Behind him, the wall is decorated with several framed photographs, and a white headless mannequin wearing a white garment stands to his right. Clothing racks with various garments are visible in the background. Two logos are present on the screen: one in the bottom left and another in the bottom right that reads "BOOGIE FLY TOT". Across the sequence, the man maintains a similar posture, looking slightly to his left with a neutral expression, while making slight movements with his head and mouth as if speaking.
